scenes.description: 一个人在室内使用笔记本电脑，环境安静专注，正在进行文字输入或编程工作。
scenes.video_prompt: A focused adult sits at a wooden desk in a warm-lit home office, typing rapidly on a laptop. Soft natural light streams through a nearby window, casting gentle shadows across the room. The environment is tidy, with a pen holder, folders, and books subtly placed on the desk. The camera holds a medium shot with slight depth of field, emphasizing concentration. Wearing a casual T-shirt, the person occasionally glances at the screen before continuing to type. No facial details are visible, preserving privacy. Visual style is realistic with warm tones, soft highlights, and minimal motion blur. Camera remains static with a fixed tripod setup, capturing subtle hand movements. Resolution: 1920x1080, 24fps, natural color grading.

style_elements.characters: An adult in casual clothing, face blurred, showing focused body language
style_elements.environment: Indoor home office with warm lighting, wooden desk, and simple decor
style_elements.visual_style: Realistic, warm-toned, softly lit, with natural depth of field
style_elements.camera_movement: Static medium shot, fixed tripod, no movement

scenes.description: 音频切换为卡通风格故事：小动物驾驶拖拉机前往泥潭，途中提醒小心木头和高度，进入泥坑后车轮打滑无法前进。
scenes.video_prompt: Animated countryside scene featuring a small tractor driven by a cartoon bear, with a rabbit passenger. Lush green fields surround a bumpy dirt road leading toward a muddy pit. The sky is bright blue with soft clouds. As the tractor approaches wooden logs, the characters react with surprise. Suddenly, it sinks into thick brown mud, wheels spinning uselessly. Camera follows from low-angle side tracking, then shifts to close-up of spinning tires and frustrated expressions. Characters wear simple colorful outfits; animation style is cheerful and rounded with soft shading. Sound effects imply slipping and struggle. Lighting is bright daylight with strong contrast. Camera transitions from wide establishing shot to dynamic close-ups. Resolution: 1920x1080, 30fps, vibrant color palette.

style_elements.characters: Cartoon animals: bear driver and rabbit passenger, expressive faces, simple designs
style_elements.environment: Rural landscape with dirt path, mud pit, green hills, and sunny sky
style_elements.visual_style: Colorful 2D animation with soft edges, playful tone, high saturation
style_elements.camera_movement: Side tracking shot transitioning to close-ups, dynamic angle shifts

scenes.description: 小兔子下车尝试推车失败，与小绵羊一同被困，拖拉机深陷泥浆，角色表现出沮丧但保持乐观。
scenes.video_prompt: The rabbit hops out of the tractor and pushes against the rear wheel, but slips in the mud. A sheep joins, both struggling as splashes fly. The tractor remains stuck, tilted slightly forward. Close-ups show muddy paws, messy fur, and comically ruined hairstyles—'mud-splattered look.' Despite frustration, their expressions remain hopeful. Background features isolated field under grayish clouds, emphasizing isolation. Camera pans between characters, using over-the-shoulder angles during dialogue. Warm character colors contrast with dull mud tones. Animated textures simulate wet soil and fabric. Gentle wind rustles grass. Style maintains family-friendly charm. Resolution: 1920x1080, 24fps, soft focus transitions between emotional beats.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit and sheep in muddy condition, exaggerated reactions, expressive eyes
style_elements.environment: Muddy rural field, isolated setting, overcast hints in sky
style_elements.visual_style: Soft 2D animation with texture detail on mud and fur
style_elements.camera_movement: Pan shots and over-the-shoulder angles, moderate pacing

scenes.description: 小胡想到办法，寻找工具并找到自制的真空吸尘器，计划用其清除泥浆。
scenes.video_prompt: Cut to a clever fox rummaging through a shed, pulling out parts and assembling a large vacuum cleaner with duct-taped hoses and glowing indicators. Bright sparks fly humorously as he connects wires. He triumphantly lifts the device, shouting 'Found it!' Camera zooms in on the quirky invention—part machine, part junk—with comedic exaggeration. Back at the scene, the bear helps carry it while the others watch hopefully. Daylight fades slightly, adding urgency. Animation uses bouncy timing and slapstick elements. Close-up on switch flipping. Sound design builds anticipation. Visuals blend creativity and whimsy. Resolution: 1920x1080, 30fps, dynamic lighting with spotlight effect on the device.

style_elements.characters: Fox inventor with goggles, energetic movements, creative demeanor
style_elements.environment: Wooden shed and muddy field, mix of mechanical clutter and nature
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical 2D animation with exaggerated proportions and comic timing
style_elements.camera_movement: Zoom-in on invention, cutaways to reactions, handheld-style shake for energy

scenes.description: 吸尘器连接拖拉机电池开始工作，成功吸走泥浆，拖拉机逐渐脱离困境。
scenes.video_prompt: The vacuum hose plunges into the mud, creating a powerful suction sound. Mud gurgles and lifts into the tank as the ground clears around the wheels. The tractor slowly rises, supported by reduced resistance. Characters cheer as the bear gives a thumbs-up. Camera circles the scene in a smooth crane-like arc, highlighting the transformation from stuck to free. Light returns to full brightness, symbolizing hope restored. Animated particles show flying droplets and drying terrain. Close-up on clean tires regaining traction. Music swells with victory tone. Device emits a happy beep when full. Visual continuity links effort to success. Resolution: 1920x1080, 24fps, enhanced motion clarity for fluid action.

style_elements.characters: All animals engaged, showing teamwork and growing excitement
style_elements.environment: Previously muddy area now partially cleared, drying earth
style_elements.visual_style: Bright animated sequence with dynamic particle effects and clear lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Circular tracking shot, rising arc to emphasize breakthrough

scenes.description: 小熊推动拖拉机脱困，大家上车继续旅程，准备为饥饿的小羊送甘草。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear braces and pushes the rear of the tractor with grunts, finally getting it onto solid ground. Wheels grip firmly, and the engine revs successfully. Everyone climbs back aboard, waving joyfully. The vehicle drives off along a cleaned path toward distant hills where baby lambs wait. Camera follows from behind in a steady dolly-out, then tilts up to reveal a wider pastoral landscape. Sky turns golden-orange, suggesting late afternoon. Expressions radiate relief and determination. Background score becomes uplifting. Vehicle leaves clean tracks, contrasting earlier chaos. Consistent character design and color scheme maintain cohesion. Resolution: 1920x1080, 24fps, warm sunset grading with lens flare accents.

style_elements.characters: Team of animal friends, re-energized and united after challenge
style_elements.environment: Open countryside path, transitioning from mud to dry land
style_elements.visual_style: Warm-hued animation with cinematic lighting and emotional tone
style_elements.camera_movement: Dolly-out followed by upward tilt, smooth and celebratory

scenes.description: 送达甘草后，小羊们开心进食，大家跳舞庆祝互助与成功。
scenes.video_prompt: The tractor arrives at a cozy meadow where hungry lambs leap with joy. Bales of hay are unloaded and devoured immediately. The group breaks into a cheerful dance—bear wobbles, rabbit hops rhythmically, fox spins, sheep baa happily. Colorful music notes float in the air, and flowers bounce to the beat. Camera rotates in a joyful orbital motion, capturing all characters in sync. Sunset casts long shadows and golden rims on fur. Final frame shows 'Thank you!' written in the dirt. Wholesome tone prevails. Animated smiles dominate. Resolution: 1920x1080, 30fps, enhanced vibrancy and motion smoothing for dance sequence.

style_elements.characters: Animals dancing together, full of joy and camaraderie
style_elements.environment: Sunny meadow at sunset, peaceful and inviting
style_elements.visual_style: Festive 2D animation with musical motifs and glowing warmth
style_elements.camera_movement: Orbital rotation around dancing group, lively and rhythmic
